requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport — UN 38.3 and Dangerous Goods Documents
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池运输——UN 38.3及危险货物文件
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池運輸——UN 38.3及危險貨物文件

summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries shipped to South Africa need UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3 evidence where lithium-battery transport rules apply. Exporters should prepare a UN 38.3 test summary, SDS, dangerous-goods classification, packaging evidence, and air or sea transport documentation for the exact shipped configuration.
summary.zh: 运往南非的锂电芯和电池在适用锂电池运输规则时，需要具备《联合国试验和标准手册》第三部分38.3小节证据。出口商应为实际出货配置准备UN 38.3测试概要、SDS、危险货物分类、包装证据以及空运或海运文件。
summary.zht: 運往南非的鋰電芯和電池在適用鋰電池運輸規則時，需要具備《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第三部分38.3小節證據。出口商應為實際出貨配置準備UN 38.3測試概要、SDS、危險貨物分類、包裝證據以及空運或海運文件。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3
ICAO Technical Instructions / IATA DGR for air transport

summary.en: China exporters commonly prepare UN 38.3 reports, test summaries, SDS / MSDS, and dangerous-goods packaging documents. Those documents remain useful, but they must cover the cell, module, rack, cabinet, or container configuration actually shipped to South Africa.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常准备UN 38.3报告、测试概要、SDS / MSDS和危险货物包装文件。这些文件仍然有用，但必须覆盖实际运往南非的电芯、模组、电池架、机柜或集装箱配置。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常準備UN 38.3報告、測試概要、SDS / MSDS和危險貨物包裝文件。這些文件仍然有用，但必須覆蓋實際運往南非的電芯、模組、電池架、機櫃或貨櫃配置。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test report and test summary

gap.en: The transport gap is configuration control. A cell-level UN 38.3 report may not cover a complete rack, replacement battery pack, integrated cabinet, or changed state of charge. Exporters should align UN numbers, proper shipping names, package marks, SDS classifications, and test summaries before handover to carriers.
gap.zh: 运输差距在于配置控制。电芯级UN 38.3报告未必覆盖完整电池架、替换电池包、集成机柜或改变荷电状态后的产品。出口商应在交付承运人前统一UN编号、正式运输名称、包装标识、SDS分类和测试概要。
gap.zht: 運輸差距在於配置控制。電芯級UN 38.3報告未必覆蓋完整電池架、替換電池包、整合機櫃或改變荷電狀態後的產品。出口商應在交付承運人前統一UN編號、正式運輸名稱、包裝標識、SDS分類和測試概要。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium battery transport where dangerous-goods transport rules apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export transport where dangerous-goods transport rules apply

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] South African market documents do not replace UN 38.3 transport evidence. The actual shipped lithium battery configuration must be covered by the test summary and dangerous-goods documents.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 南非市场文件不能替代UN 38.3运输证据。实际出货的锂电池配置必须被测试概要和危险货物文件覆盖。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 南非市場文件不能替代UN 38.3運輸證據。實際出貨的鋰電池配置必須被測試概要和危險貨物文件覆蓋。
